base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_banner — a ui (dialog) from 1986 legend of zelda. 'THE LEGEND OF ZELDA' title-banner — gold stylized text over castle/triforce background. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'THE LEGEND OF ZELDA' title-banner — gold stylized text over castle/triforce background; iconic screen-1 of title sequence
